mapper.sql: TSDC.ID, TSDC.STOCK_CODE, MS.STOCK_NAME, MS.TYPE_NAME, MS.STOCK_PRICE, TSDC.DIVIDEND_AMOUNT, TSDC.DIVIDEND_YIELD, TSDC.RIGHTS_LAST_DAY, TSDC.EX_DIVIDEND_DATE, TSDC.RECORD_DATE, TSDC.CONFIRMED_FLG
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM T_STOCK_DIVIDEND_CONFIRMED TSDC LEFT JOIN M_STOCK MS ON TSDC.STOCK_CODE = MS.STOCK_CODE WHERE TSDC.ID = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO T_STOCK_DIVIDEND_CONFIRMED ( STOCK_CODE, DIVIDEND_AMOUNT, DIVIDEND_YIELD, RIGHTS_LAST_DAY, EX_DIVIDEND_DATE, RECORD_DATE, CONFIRMED_FLG ) VALUES ( #{stockCode}, #{dividendAmount}, #{dividendYield}, #{rightsLastDay}, #{exDividendDate}, #{recordDate}, #{confirmedFlg} )
mapper.update: UPDATE T_STOCK_DIVIDEND_CONFIRMED SET STOCK_CODE = #{stockCode}, DIVIDEND_AMOUNT = #{dividendAmount}, DIVIDEND_YIELD = #{dividendYield}, RIGHTS_LAST_DAY = #{rightsLastDay}, EX_DIVIDEND_DATE = #{exDividendDate}, RECORD_DATE = #{recordDate}, CONFIRMED_FLG = #{confirmedFlg} WHERE ID = #{id}
mapper.select:
SELECT SDC.RIGHTS_LAST_DAY, COUNT(1) AS TOTAL_COUNT, SUM(CASE WHEN SDC.CONFIRMED_FLG = '1' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS CONFIRMED_COUNT, AVG(SDC.DIVIDEND_AMOUNT) AS AVG_DIVIDEND_AMOUNT, AVG(SDC.DIVIDEND_YIELD) AS AVG_DIVIDEND_YIELD FROM T_STOCK_DIVIDEND_CONFIRMED SDC LEFT JOIN M_STOCK MS ON SDC.STOCK_CODE = MS.STOCK_CODE
SDC.RIGHTS_LAST_DAY IS NOT NULL AND (MS.TYPE_CODE IS NULL OR MS.TYPE_CODE <> '9999')
GROUP BY SDC.RIGHTS_LAST_DAY ORDER BY SDC.RIGHTS_LAST_DAY DESC
